front: Novel: opens 'Last night I dreamt I went to Manderley again'; the unnamed narrator is tormented by housekeeper Mrs. Danvers
Novel: the narrator wears a dead woman's dress to a ball at Mrs. Danvers's suggestion; Mrs. Danvers burns down the estate at the end
Short Story: Cornish veteran Nat Hocken smokes his 'last cigarette' as the title animals attack at high tide; adapted by Hitchcock
Short Story: John is killed in Venice by a knife-throwing dwarf in a red pixie hood after seeing psychic elderly twins
Novel: Mary Yellan discovers vicar Francis Davey leads ship-sinking 'wreckers'; Joss Merlyn keeps the title Cornish guesthouse
Novel: Philip Ashley suspects the title character of poisoning his father Ambrose, aided by the dubious advisor Rainaldi
